title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zensar Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Zensar Technologies:
Zensar Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
